articles.title: Vitamin D Blocks Propofol Brain Damage in Newborns — Yet Another Suppressed Protective Protocol
articles.summary: New mouse study shows vitamin D prevents neurotoxicity from propofol anesthesia during pregnancy, protecting developing brains. Yet another cheap, natural intervention that could save countless children from surgical brain damage — but don't expect anesthesiologists to start recommending it.
